transcript: GM! Okay, that was in time. Let's go. In less than 12 months from now, I guarantee you that every targeted ad you will see on Solana will go through Solana ID. And here's why. Because marketing in crypto really sucks right now. It's blind spray and pray. You throw money against the wall, you see what sticks. That's KOLs, event sponsorships and so on. But how the fuck do you actually track campaigns and measure results? With us you can. And let me tell you, the market is huge. I think in the next 12 months as well, there's gonna be 2 billion dollars of value in the targeted ad market on Solana, and that can be captured. 85% of that right now is untapped. In Web2 it works already. So let me paint you the picture of the promised land. Which is in my opinion, on-chain data that you can use to discover your target audience. And off-chain data that we plug into the system to even further customize the targeting options for you. And how does it work? Happily you asked. We have a very simple tier system that we can use to identify high valuable users on Solana based on their behavior on-chain. And we also have a more advanced targeting system when it comes to badges like NFT trading, liquidity provisioning or staking. We have two types of partners for us. Perk partners are our customers. Could be all of you if you have a project and you want to acquire users on Solana. You run campaigns with us. Through the Display Network which are our Display Partners. If you have a high traffic app on Solana, you can monetize your traffic and ship valuable perks to your users. Win-win and Solana ID wins as well. Now, there's another part to it, which is the Solana ID Hub. That's our user facing frontend, where we right now already have more than 15,000 users that already added a bunch of wallets to their profiles, which makes our targeting even more efficient. Now when it comes to the Solana ID Display Network, we already integrated with more than 5 high traffic apps on Solana. You log in with your wallet, we check your on-chain reputation, and we will give you a targeted reward right into your frontend on that third-party app. This is how we can really scale distribution. You can also set up campaigns as a Perk Partner with us and we build a dashboard where you can actually track things like click-through rates, conversion rates, and return on ad spend and all that stuff, which is very normal in Web2, but in crypto, no one gives a shit, but you should. And last but not least, we have the Solana ID Holder Hub, you can sign up to Solana ID to increase your chances to get valuable perks on-chain. We have more than 15,000 users over there already right now. We just gained 5,000 this week because of a big partnership with our friends from MetaMask. Much love. Now, we've been cooking already a few months. We have more than 15 campaigns we launched. More than a million dollars of funding. And we have more than 15,000 users signed up to our app. We are settlers, not tourists. My co-founder Pierre is the marketing wizard. Ben is doing the growth for Solana ID and together we will scale this up into the layer for the most efficient user acquisition on-chain. So join us now and get solid.

# Solana Breakpoint 2025: Key Announcements and Stories from Saturday
Day Three maintained the high expectations with announcements from Solflare, Solana Mobile, and Colosseum, among others.
[Pablo](https://solanafloor.com/author/pablo)
Copy link
* Published:
* Edited:
It was said that this year’s Breakpoint would be Solana’s biggest conference yet, and I’m sure none of the several thousand delegates that made their way to the Etihad Arena this week would disagree with that sentiment.
Saturday’s session featured a diverse set of updates highlighting Solana’s continued expansion across hardware, real-world assets, and institutional finance, as well as side events such as Predictify, hosted by[Kalshi](https://x.com/Kalshi?s=20).
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999766576091025438?s=20)> The last day of Breakpoint 2025 delivered a mix of hackathon results, product demonstrations, and strategic commitments that underscored the network’s growing role as a settlement layer for both digital and traditional assets.
Here’s what you missed if you’re not in Abu Dhabi:
## At Breakpoint
1. Colosseum has announced winners for its Cypherpunk hackathon
* *Unruggable, the Solana-native hardware wallet, is crowned grand champion.*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999765402453467212?s=20)> 1. Uranium Digital demoed their product, which enables institutions to buy Uranium onchain for the first time.
* *Settlement is happening fully on Solana*
* *The entire crypto experience is abstracted*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999744679441826044?s=20)> 1. RockawayX launches 3 vaults on Solana.
* *Risk-curated RWA vault on Kamino*
* *Additional vaults on Exponent Finance and MidasRWA*
* *Partners with Figure, Onre, Solstice, and Huma as professional curators for these vaults.*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999753859456204968?s=20)> 1. Solana Mobile is expanding beyond its own devices to additional hardware.
* *Working with FXTech, MediaTek, and Trustonic to integrate the Solana Mobile stack at the chipset level for other Android devices.*
* *MediaTek ships roughly 50% of all Android devices globally.*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999757725505642967?s=20)> 1. Splyce Finance introduces $SFULC on Solana.
* *$SFULC is a yield-bearing token offering 10% APY powered by Fulcrum Lending*
* *Powered by real cash flows from senior, secured multifamily credit.*
* *$SFULC can be minted with stablecoins or bought directly on Raydium.*
> [](https://twitter.com/SolanaFloor/status/1999761140931526825?s=20)> 1. VC Firm 6th Man Ventures announces that it is focused on Solan

* Dec 13, 2025 06:47 UTC
* 2 minutes read
* * * # Jupiter Unveils JupUSD Stablecoin and Major DeFi Upgrades at Solana Breakpoint 2025
Story Highlights
* Jupiter launches JupUSD stablecoin & 8 major upgrades, boosting Solana DeFi with lending, trading tools, rewards & ecosystem safety.
* Solana’s top DEX aggregator Jupiter unveils JupUSD, open-source lending, new Terminal & $1M rewards to fuel DeFi growth.
Jupiter, the top[decentralized exchange](https://coinpedia.org/decentralized-exchange/)(DEX) aggregator on Solana, has unveiled a comprehensive suite of eight major upgrades at Solana Breakpoint 2025, designed to transform the platform into a full-scale DeFi hub. The primary goals of these upgrades are to simplify DeFi, improve safety, and complete Jupiter’s offerings beyond just token swaps.
[Advertisement](https://coinpedia.org/advertising/)[](https://bit.ly/4qIkEoO)
## **JupUSD Brings a Native Stablecoin**
The biggest[announcement](https://x.com/JupiterExchange/status/1999154800982729175?s=20)is JupUSD, a new dollar-backed[stablecoin](https://coinpedia.org/beginners-guide/what-are-stablecoins/)built with Ethena. Unlike most stablecoins that live separately from apps, JupUSD is designed to work directly inside Jupiter’s products. Users will be able to use it while setting up DCA strategies, placing limit orders, and taking part in prediction markets, while also earning rewards. Jupiter believes that owning both the stablecoin and the platform allows funds to move more smoothly across swaps, perpetual trades, and lending. JupUSD is set to launch next week and will tap into the large trading volumes already

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a crystalline prism as the Semantic Anchor because it perfectly visualizes Solana ID's core function: transforming the chaotic, disordered 'spray and pray' marketing (represented by scattered light) into a focused, targeted, and valuable beam (the organized light). It's a powerful metaphor for an infrastructure 'layer' that brings order and clarity. I included the text '$2B' as a diegetic holographic projection within the prism to represent the immense market value that this new layer aims to capture and organize, as highlighted in the transcript.
visual_idea.description: A large, flawless optical glass prism sits center-frame, mounted on a dark, anodized aluminum base like a piece of advanced scientific equipment. From the left, a chaotic spray of multicolored, pixelated light representing 'spray and pray' ads enters the prism. As the light travels through the crystal, it is refracted and organized, and a shimmering, diegetic holographic projection of '$2B' appears embedded within the glass. The light exits the right side as a single, coherent, focused beam of Solana-purple light, hitting a precise point off-screen. The background is a dark, deep-focus server room, with subtle glowing data streams suggesting a vast network.

It is securely mounted on a dark, anodized aluminum base, expertly crafted to resemble advanced scientific equipment. From the left, a chaotic spray of multicolored, pixelated light, representing 'spray and pray' ads, intensely streams into the prism's crystalline structure. Inside the glass, the light is dramatically refracted and organized by intricate caustic lighting, revealing a shimmering, diegetic holographic projection of '$2B' embedded deep within the material. This holographic data glows with high contrast, appearing spatially correct and vibrant within the prism. A single, coherent, focused beam of brilliant Solana-purple light exits the right side, cutting through the darkness to hit a precise point off-screen. The background is a dark, deep-focus server room, extending upwards to emphasize the epic scale, with subtle glowing data streams suggesting a vast, intricate network. Ample negative space at the top enhances the monumental feel of the composition. 8k, octane render, raytracing, physically based rendering, hyper-detailed, photorealistic.

final_prompt.prompt_text:
A macro 1:1 shot, hyperrealistic and ultra-detailed, focusing intently on the sharp-edged facets of a perfectly symmetrical crystalline prism. The composition features a central focus, tightly framed to fill the entire square aspect ratio (1:1) with the exquisite texture of flawless optical glass. We witness the exact moment of impact where a chaotic jumble of colorful, abstract light rays, possessing a vibrant holographic quality, strikes the pristine glass surface. The primary focus is on the breathtaking, complex caustic patterns and intricate refractions unfolding just inside the prism, vividly illustrating the initial process of these energetic light rays being bent, organized, and scientifically processed. The optical glass texture is the main subject, rendered with hyperrealistic precision, symbolizing the raw processing of complex data, reminiscent of a high-end scientific instrument. The lighting is dramatic and focused, utilizing ray-traced optics and physically based rendering (PBR) to meticulously capture every nuance of light interaction, reflection, and subsurface scattering, enhancing the iridescent refractions and brilliant caustics.

8k, octane render, raytracing, physically based rendering (PBR), global illumination, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, studio macro photography, zero distortion.

editorial.headline: Solana ID Unveils Ad Layer to Capture $2B Market
editorial.standfirst: Founder Simon Molitor pitches a shift from "spray and pray" to measurable ROAS, leveraging a strategic MetaMask integration to scale identity-based targeting.
key_takeaways: **$2B Market Opportunity:** Molitor projects on-chain targeted advertising will generate $2B in value over the next 12 months, with 85% currently untapped.
**Strategic Distribution:** A partnership with **MetaMask** has driven 5,000 new user sign-ups in one week, pushing total users past 15,000.
**Infrastructure Play:** The "Display Network" allows dApps to monetize traffic similar to Web2 ad networks, supported by over $1M in funding.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
Marketing in crypto is currently broken—a "blind spray and pray" model dominated by KOLs and unmeasurable event sponsorships. Simon Molitor, CEO of **Solana ID**, argues that the ecosystem is maturing into a phase where institutional capital demands accountability. By building an identity layer that tracks on-chain behavior (staking, liquidity provisioning, NFT trading), Solana ID aims to introduce Web2-style metrics—Click-Through Rates (CTR) and Return on Ad Spend (ROAS)—to the Solana network.

The platform operates on a dual-sided marketplace model designed to abstract the complexity of on-chain data. For advertisers (termed "Perk Partners"), it offers granular targeting based on wallet history, distinguishing high-value users from bots. For publishers, the **Solana ID Display Network** integrates directly into high-traffic dApps, allowing them to monetize user attention natively. This creates a closed loop where ad spend is verified on-chain, effectively building the "Google AdSense" of Solana.

Execution risk is being mitigated by aggressive distribution partnerships. The standout development is a collaboration with **MetaMask**, which has already accelerated user acquisition by 33% in a single week. With over 15 active campaigns and integration into five major Solana apps, the project is moving from proof-of-concept to a scalable infrastructure layer, positioned to capture the projected $2B flow of marketing capital entering the ecosystem over the next year.
